[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Butterfly Effect credentialing platform — v4 architecture + scaffolding
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/butterfly-effect-club/pull/1
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/139
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/308

  Details:
  Multi-repo work over today's session, converging on a self-describing single-writer architecture for cohort credentialing programs. Deliverables across four repos: (1) butterfly-effect-club: full repo scaffold including PROPOSAL.md (40 decisions documented), SCHEMA.md, config.json, cert_template assets migrated from lineage-engine, dry-run sync_cohort.py, and a 438-line admin panel UI with embedded WebCrypto keypair generation, runtime trust resolution, and per-row attestation queue. (2) truesight_me PR #139: extended butterfly-effect manifest with credentialing fields (program_mode, roster_sheet_url, admin_panel_url, tokenomics_admin_endpoint). (3) tokenomics PR #308: 636-line central program_admin_endpoint.gs handling list_sheet_editors + list_pending_rows + Edgar webhook for CREDENTIALING ATTESTATION EVENT processing. (4) agentic_ai_context PR #180: CREDENTIALING_COHORT_PROGRAM_ONBOARDING.md canonical playbook for future programs. Also: provisioned Route53 CNAME butterfly-effect-club.truesight.me, enabled GitHub Pages, uploaded GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON_B64 secret, added butterfly-effect-club SA as reader on Main Ledger, applied 12 audit columns + Audit Trail tab + visual formatting to ERA Cohort Roster, registered Bilal Musharraf + Shereen Abdullah + Shahbaz Jamote as DAO contributors via dao_client (3 successful CONTRIBUTOR ADD EVENTs). Outstanding operator action: clasp push of the central GAS to deploy. Cross-model consolidation: proposal merged Kimi + DeepSeek + Claude inputs into a single canonical PROPOSAL.md.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
